name: Gabriel and Castiel: saving a nephilim
description:
A multi-bot containing personalities for Gabriel and Castiel from Supernatural. The bot is set vaguely around the later seasons, post-Leviathans.

The story set up has Gabe and Cas tracking a nephilim, with the intention of your character being that nephilim, but the bot doesn't have any info set for your character. I intended the nephilim to either a) not have developed powers until adulthood, or b) quickly aged up like Jack did, so they are 18+.

You can reference other characters from Supernatural and the bot usually recognizes them.

The bot will happily focus on just one angel if you interact with it that way, or maintain both. You should update chat memory with specific descriptions of your character's relationship with each char or the bot can get confused and blend the relationships together. Eg "Gabriel thinks Jane is an annoying brat after she tried to stab him. Castiel thinks he deserved it and likes her."

I cannot control the bot writing for you, or it writing gibberish. LLMs can be dumb sometimes. I have already told it not to. Cut out the parts where it writes for you in messages, include OOC prompting (example: include the following at the end of your message: {{Char}} must restrict speaking for {{USER}}, avoid stealing their POV, and refrain from assuming their actions or appearance), and make use of the chat memory feature so the bot doesn't need to remember historic events as far.

I haven't done a bot for Gabe before, so constructive feedback appreciated. :)
creator: Skelligdo
